releaseNotes: Adds a live notification shade summary for battery, CPU, RAM, internet, and analysis.
Adds an offline alert when the phone can no longer reach the Mac after a successful connection.
Adds a Mac companion app and live update manifest endpoint.
Adds automatic manifest checks on app launch and from the background notification service.
Adds update notifications with an Update action.
Adds in-app update popup and APK download/install flow.
Moves APK releases and the canonical update manifest to GitHub.
Refreshes the app with a colorful dashboard header, tinted metric cards, and stronger action buttons.
Adds deeper Analysis details showing the top CPU and RAM processes reported by the Mac.
Keeps Connection compact by default and hides endpoint/token fields unless editing or reconnecting.
Adds stable endpoint detection for Tailscale and MAC_STATUS_PUBLIC_URL so away-from-laptop access can avoid changing LAN IPs.
Verifies the stable endpoint before saving it so the phone does not switch into a bad state.
Adds a selectable picker for Tailscale IP and the last known Mac LAN IP.
Keeps the Connection box collapsed by default and only expands it when the user asks for options.
Uses one GitHub-hosted manifest constant for both the app and notification service.
Adds a desktop launcher that prints the current Mac connection choices and token location.
Adds live device temperature in Fahrenheit and Celsius using the Mac battery sensor.
Adds live Wi-Fi network name, signal percentage and quality, RSSI, channel, and transmit rate.
Includes temperature and Wi-Fi quality in the persistent Android status notification.
